name: operator namespace block in PR-SOURCES.yaml is never overwritten by the daily-fresh sync mechanism
command:
mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro && printf 'sources: []
operator_namespace:
  - {id: my-internal, source_class: financial-industry, tier: 2, applies_to: [node]}
' > .claude-tdd-pro/PR-SOURCES.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/pr-corpus/sync-from-sources.sh" --registry .claude-tdd-pro/PR-SOURCES.yaml --dry-run 2>err.txt && grep -q 'operator_namespace_preserved=true' err.txt && grep -q 'my-internal' .claude-tdd-pro/PR-SOURCES.yaml && echo ok 1>&2
